### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.3.31 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in Discord slash command and autocomplete paths that fail to enforce group DM channel allowlist restrictions. Authorized Discord users can bypass channel restrictions by invoking slash commands, allowing access to restricted group DM channels.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qgp3-3rj7-qqq4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T21:58:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qgp3-3rj7-qqq4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qgp3-3rj7-qqq4"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T22:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T00:31:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-rvvf-6vh3-9j43", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41348", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/8fdb19676ab44cf85d47ee13c578195f2e527591", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-group-dm-channel-allowlist-bypass-via-discord-slash-commands", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qgp3-3rj7-qqq4"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Discord Slash Commands Bypass Group DM Channel Allowlist", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T21:58:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qgp3-3rj7-qqq4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.31"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-04T21:58:42Z"}
